productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunar Swift +3 Black Sports Shoes
description: An absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+3 offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+3 features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet.The Nike Lunarswift+ 3 range of shoes a have low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators, what with its ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe.Breezy touch to snug shoesWith a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ 3 shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ 3 and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot.UpperOpen mesh upper made of synthetic leather for ample breathabilityMicrofiber synthetic overlays in the forefoot and rearfoot for snug fitHeel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around rearfoot for stability of the heelMoulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfortMidsoleLunarLite technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy returnDynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronationCuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfootCertified pedorthic practitioners (known as pedorthists) are specialists in foot orthotics (pedorthics).OutsoleBRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durabilityEPR forefoot for multi-surface tractionWaffle pattern outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioningShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
